x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Trax CLI — generate Trax API projects from schemas

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a Trax API project from a schema file

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for the generated project

options.name: --name
options.description: Project name (used for namespace and csproj)

options.name: --type
options.description: Schema type: graphql or openapi (auto-detected from extension if omitted)

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite the output directory if it exists [default: False]
